page.content: The study analyzed various tested CNTs, specifically their Length (μm) and Diameter (nm) measurements, alongside treatment effects on pH levels. For SWCNT, the Length is 1–5 μm and the Diameter is ∼1.5 nm. MWCNT (type 1) has a Length of 30±10 μm and a Diameter of 1–5 nm, while MWCNT (type 2) also has a Length of 30±15 μm and a Diameter of 1–5 nm. MWCNT (type 3) measures 30±10 μm in Length and its Diameter ranges from 5–20 nm, whereas MWCNT (type 4) exhibits a Length of 30±15 μm and a Diameter between 5–20 nm. In terms of treatment effects, for Ck (-K+-PHE), the pH1 is 5.50, pH2 is 5.47 ± 0.06d, and ΔpH is -0.03 ± 0.06d. The treatment with +5.62 μM PHE shows pH1 at 5.50, pH2 at 5.82 ± 0.03a, and ΔpH at 0.32 ± 0.03a. The +0.2 mM K+ treatment has pH1 at 5.50, pH2 at 5.38 ± 0.01e, and ΔpH at -0.12 ± 0.01e.

page.content: The combination of +0.2 mM K+ and +5.62 μM PHE records pH1 at 5.50, pH2 at 5.72 ± 0.03b, and ΔpH at 0.22 ± 0.03b.

lines.text: The combination of +0.2 mM K+ and +5.62 μM PHE records pH1 at 5.50, pH2 at 5.72 ± 0.03b, and ΔpH at 0.22 ± 0.03b.

page.content: The treatment with +6 mM K+ has pH1 at 5.50, pH2 at 5.32 ± 0.02f, and ΔpH at -0.18 ± 0.02f, while +6 mM K+ combined with +5.62 μM PHE shows pH1 at 5.50, pH2 at 5.65 ± 0.02c, and ΔpH at 0.15 ± 0.02c.

with +5.62 μM PHE shows pH1 at 5.50, pH2 at 5.65 ± 0.02c, and ΔpH at 0.15 ± 0.02c.
